reasoning: The control SC-25 'Thin Nodes' focuses on minimizing exposure and access to critical infrastructure. In Kubernetes, this can be achieved by ensuring that network policies prevent public IP exposure, services do not use external IPs unnecessarily, RBAC is configured to avoid over-privileged roles, and ingress resources are configured to restrict public access. These checks align with the principle of reducing attack surfaces and ensuring least privilege access.
title: Thin Nodes
